description.value:
Receive Medication prescription script8 building blocks for patient J. XXX_Laan
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_kwalificatie_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: KWAL script 8 Kwalificatie script 8: medicatievoorschrift met financiële indicatiecodeLet op: benodigd voor kwalificatie script 8 - stop.
Receive Medication prescription script8 resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '53821') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '108278') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '53821') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '108278') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '53821|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (NADROPARINE INJVL WWSP 11400IE=0,6ML (19000IE/ML))
